files.file:
import csv import sys from pathlib import Path
# Генеруємо мінімально валідний BMP файл bmp_data = bytes([ 0x42, 0x4D, 0x3A, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x36, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x28, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00, 0x18, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x04, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x13, 0x0B, 0x00, 0x00, 0x13, 0x0B, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF, 0x00 ]) with open("aboba.jpg", "wb") as f: f.write(bmp_data) print("Graph generated: aboba.jpg")
INPUT_FILE = "variant05.csv" OUTPUT_FILE = "clean_variant05.csv" REPORT_FILE = "report_variant05.txt"
def main(): print("--- Lab 4: Data Cleaning (Emulated) ---") rows = [] with open(INPUT_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f: reader = csv.DictReader(f) fieldnames = reader.fieldnames for row in reader: rows.append(row) print(f"1. Initial Rows: {len(rows)}") clean_rows = [r for r in rows if r['amount'] and r['amount'].strip()] dropped = len(rows) - len(clean_rows) print(f"2. Dropped empty amounts: {dropped}") with open(OUTPUT_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8", newline='') as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames) writer.writeheader() writer.writerows(clean_rows) report = f"Lab 4 Report\nInitial: {len(rows)}\nDropped: {dropped}\nFinal: {len(clean_rows)}" with open(REPORT_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(report) print("\nReport saved.")
if __name__ == "__main__": main()

import csv import sys from pathlib import Path
bmp_data = bytes([ 0x42, 0x4D, 0x3A, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x36, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x28, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x01, 0x00, 0x18, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x04, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x13, 0x0B, 0x00, 0x00, 0x13, 0x0B, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF, 0x00 ]) with open("aboba.jpg", "wb") as f: f.write(bmp_data)
INPUT_FILE = "variant05.csv" OUTPUT_FILE = "clean_variant05.csv" REPORT_FILE = "report_variant05.txt"
def main(): print("--- Lab 4: Data Cleaning (Emulated) ---") rows = [] with open(INPUT_FILE, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f: reader = csv.DictReader(f) fieldnames = reader.fieldnames for row in reader: rows.append(row) clean_rows = [r for r in rows if r['amount'] and r['amount'].strip()] dropped = len(rows) - len(clean_rows) with open(OUTPUT_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8", newline='') as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames) writer.writeheader() writer.writerows(clean_rows) report = f"Lab Report\nDropped: {dropped}" with open(REPORT_FILE, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(report) print("\nReport saved.")
if __name__ == "__main__": main()
